calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-09-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Anna Sandler, appearance is waived as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jonathan Leonard Rathman.
Mr. Michael Rathman, the minor's father, present in court, was sworn, examined, and consented to the petition for change of name of a minor.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Jonathan Leonard Sandler-Rathman.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-26-2004 Reset To Nov-09-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye.
Petitioner: Anna Sandler, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jonathan Leonard Rathman, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Nov. 9, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for appearance of the minor's father.

Off Calendar Oct-06-2004 Granted Per Written Order
